Conditional inclusion of STM32 microcontroller family-specific IRQ definitions.

# Purpose
The code is a configuration file that includes specific interrupt request (IRQ) definitions based on the microcontroller family being used. It uses preprocessor directives to check for the defined microcontroller family, such as `MICRO_FAMILY_STM32F2`, `MICRO_FAMILY_STM32F4`, or `MICRO_FAMILY_STM32F7`. Depending on the defined family, it includes the corresponding IRQ definition file, such as `irq_stm32f2_f4.def` or `irq_stm32f7.def`. If none of the specified microcontroller families are configured, the code generates a preprocessor error indicating an unrecognized or missing configuration. This ensures that the correct IRQ definitions are used for the specified microcontroller family.
